feedback_summary.description: Summary of the feedback analysis: how many reachable traces, what new hunt directions emerged.

new_tasks.description: New hunt tasks derived from reachable traces. Each task explores adjacent code paths, variants, or deeper exploitation.

attack_class.description: Attack class to hunt for (may be a variant of the original class).

scope_hint.description: Narrow scope description for the hunt agent.

target_files.description: Files to focus the hunt on.

rationale.description: Why this task was generated from the trace feedback.

parent_finding_ref.description: Reference to the finding whose trace inspired this task.

variant_description.description: Description of how this task differs from or extends the original finding.

skip_feedback.description: If true, no new tasks were generated and the pipeline should skip the feedback loop.
